info.name: Microsoft Azure BlockchainManagementClient
info.description: REST API for Azure Blockchain Service

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Blockchain Blockchainmembers Blockchainmembername Consortiummembers

variable.description: (Required) Gets the subscription Id which uniquely identifies the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID is part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group that contains the resource. You can obtain this value from the Azure Resource Manager API or the portal.
(Required) Blockchain member name.

request.description: Lists the consortium members for a blockchain member.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
